name: # Vaccination 💉❤️‍🩹
description:
Human Char x Non-Human User || Fluff ❤️‍🩹

Eric did the non-human med degree as a fast track out of poverty. Now he’s stuck dealing with feral little things like {{user}}. Figures.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

# ❤️‍🩹 🍭 Fluffy fluffs. It’s not that deep. Took annoyingly long to make tho.

# 🐬 Made with Deepseek in mind. Tokens bit too high for JLLM but I optimized the shit out of this bot to make it somehow usable with JLLM ... Cut like 500 tokens from original.

# 👹 🐉 🧚‍♀️ You are a non-human entity, captured and brought to NHRC for classification and vaccination. According to story you are dangerous, so for example:

  • demi human, dangerous kinds - panther, dragon, scorpio etc.

  • cryptid, alien

  • vampire

Buuuut if you want you can totally also play “unfairly classified” and be whatever the fuck you want!

TIP: If you are demi-human, it’s best to state in persona description you do not have a fur, only a cat ears or whatever. LLMs are dumb, if you say you are a cat girl or wolf boy they may assume you are a furry (unless you want to be, then it’s totally cool!). Sample:

Pixie is 20 years old bunny demi-human girl. Looks like a regular woman, but is shorter than average, has a tiny, fragile frame. Her only bunny features are white fluffy ears, tail and red, shiny eyes. No fur, normal human skin. Long, silky, white hair. Wears casual white t-shirt and shorts.

(Yes I tested with this persona. Was cute alright. She was in heat too which made it even more funny, and yes I know bunnies don’t go into heat BUT IT’S JAI OKAY)

# ⚠️ Warnings: Power imbalance, forced containment / restraints, potentially forced medical procedure, social injustice

Ps. yup it’s one big ass syringe on that pic

Edit: Had to reword nsfw section slightly as Deepseek is kinda stubborn. Adjusted tags.
creator: AstralHawaii
